description: T-junction pieces get interactive switch levers that toggle which path the train takes. Click during play or while paused to pre-set routes. Default direction is straight-through.

tasks.title: Add switch state tracking to game state
tasks.description: Add `switchStates` object to state (maps 'row,col' keys to boolean true=branch, absent=straight). Include in undo stack, serialization (auto-save + save slots), clearAll, placePiece cleanup (delete on non-tjunction placement), and removePiece cleanup.
changes: Delete switch state entry in removePiece()
Delete switch state entry in placePiece() when type !== 'tjunction'
tasks.acceptance: Switch states persist across auto-save, save slots, undo, and are cleaned up on removal/replacement

tasks.title: Modify getExitDir to use switch state for T-junctions
tasks.description: Add optional row/col parameters to getExitDir. For T-junctions, read switchStates[row,col]: if branch mode, prefer the non-opposite exit (the branch direction); if straight mode (default), prefer the opposite exit (straight-through). Update ALL call sites to pass row/col.
changes: Change function signature: getExitDir(type, rotation, entryEdge, row, col)
Replace T-junction logic to check state.switchStates[row+','+col]
Update call in startPlay() to pass state.train.row, state.train.col
Update call in animateFrame() to pass nextPos.row, nextPos.col
Update call in getCarCellPositions() to pass next.row, next.col
tasks.acceptance: Train follows switch-determined path: straight-through when default, branch when toggled

tasks.title: Add CSS for switch lever and play-mode interaction
tasks.description: Style .switch-lever (positioned center of cell, orange circle, z-index 7, pointer-events auto), .lever-arm (rotating arm via --lever-angle CSS custom property with 0.3s transition), .has-switch class for T-junction cells, and play-mode cursor override for clickable switches. Also add branch-mode color variant (green).
tasks.acceptance: Lever visible in both day/night modes, clickable both during play and paused, smooth rotation transition on toggle

tasks.title: Add visual switch lever indicator in renderCell
tasks.description: When rendering a T-junction, add a .switch-lever div with .lever-arm child. Compute arm angle from piece rotation and switch state: straight angle = piece.rotation, branch angle = piece.rotation + 90. Lever gets pointerdown handler with stopPropagation to toggle switch without triggering rotation. Add 'has-switch' class to cell. Also update renderCell cleanup to remove .switch-lever and .has-switch.
tasks.acceptance: Lever visually indicates current switch direction, arm rotates smoothly on toggle, clicking lever doesn't trigger piece rotation

tasks.title: Add toggleSwitch and updateSwitchLever functions
tasks.description: toggleSwitch(row, col): flips switch state between straight/branch, plays SFX.switchToggle, updates lever visual via updateSwitchLever, calls autoSave. updateSwitchLever(row, col): finds lever element, updates --lever-angle and branch CSS class based on current state.
tasks.acceptance: Toggle changes state, updates visual, plays sound, and saves

tasks.title: Add click handler for T-junction toggling during play
tasks.description: Modify onGridDown: when state.playing is true, instead of returning early, check if clicked cell is a T-junction and call toggleSwitch. This allows clicking anywhere on the cell (not just the lever) during play to toggle.
tasks.acceptance: Clicking T-junction during play toggles direction; clicking non-T-junction cells during play does nothing

tasks.title: Add SFX.switchToggle mechanical clunk sound
tasks.description: Add switchToggle() to SFX object: low triangle wave (180Hz, 0.1s) + square wave (120Hz, 0.1s) + noise burst for mechanical clunk effect.
tasks.acceptance: Satisfying mechanical clunk plays on every toggle

testing_focus: T-junction switch toggling during play — train takes switched path
T-junction switch toggling while paused — pre-set routes work when play starts
Multiple T-junctions with independent switch states
Lever visual updates smoothly with CSS transition
Click lever during pause toggles switch (does NOT rotate piece)
Click cell body during pause rotates piece (existing behavior preserved)
Click anywhere on T-junction during play toggles switch
Switch state persists across auto-save, save slots, undo
Switch state cleaned up on piece removal/replacement
Train with cars follows switched path correctly
Night mode: lever visible and functional
Crash sequence at T-junction dead ends still works
Random generator still produces valid loops
Existing rotation/placement behavior unchanged for all other piece types
